description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden wardrobe with a natural wood grain finish and a rectangular, boxy shape. The front features three vertically aligned doors, two of which have tall, rectangular mirror panels set into them, while the third is solid wood. Each door is equipped with a small, round knob handle for opening. The sides and top of the wardrobe are finished in the same wood grain, while the back panel is a plain, light-colored surface, likely made of a different material for structural support. The wardrobe is designed to store clothing and personal items, making it suitable for placement in bedrooms, hallways, or even urban residential entryways.
description: A large, wood-grain wardrobe with three doors, two mirrored panels, and round knob handles. The back is plain and light-colored, contrasting with the natural wood finish on the other sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three doors, two with tall mirrors and all with round knob handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain panel with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, light-colored back panel without any decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a wood grain panel and no visible doors or handles.
